blur_detection.description: The text is sharp and clearly defined with no visible blur.

contrast_assessment.description: Excellent contrast between text and background, ensuring clear text recognition.

glare_identification.description: No glare or bright spots detected that obscure text.

water_stains.description: No water stains or discolorations affecting document readability.

tears_or_folds.description: No visible tears, creases, folds, or wrinkles on the document.

cut_off_detection.description: No edges of the document are cut off or excluded from the image.

missing_sections.description: All sections of the receipt/invoice are present and complete.

obstructions.description: No objects, fingers, shadows, or other elements obstructing document content.

classification.error_type: File identified not as an expense
classification.error_message: The document does not contain sufficient fields to be classified as an expense.
classification.reasoning: The document text provided does not contain enough information to be classified as an expense document. Key fields such as 'supplier', 'consumerRecipient', 'transactionAmount', 'transactionDate', 'invoiceReceiptNumber', 'taxInformation', 'paymentMethod', and 'itemDescriptionLineItems' are either missing or not clearly identifiable.

schema_field_analysis.expense_identification_reasoning: The document lacks the necessary fields to be identified as an expense. Specifically, it does not contain identifiable information about the supplier, consumer, transaction amount, date, invoice/receipt number, tax information, payment method, or item descriptions.

issues.description: Missing mandatory supplier name on the receipt
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Document must show the name of the vendor/merchant that provided the goods or services

issues.description: Missing mandatory transaction date on the receipt
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Receipt must show the date when the purchase/transaction occurred

issues.description: Missing mandatory total amount in local currency on the receipt
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Receipt must display the final cost including all taxes and fees

issues.description: Missing mandatory invoice number on the receipt
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Document must contain a unique invoice or receipt number for identification

issues.description: Missing mandatory item description on the receipt
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Receipt must specify the goods or services purchased with clear description (expense type/description)

issues.description: Additional documentation is required for expense reimbursement
issues.recommendation: Receipts and invoices must be submitted with expenses. Online copies are sufficient, hard copy not required. Documents must be actual tax receipts or invoices; booking confirmations will not suffice
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Receipts and invoices must be submitted with expenses. Online copies are sufficient, hard copy not required. Documents must be actual tax receipts or invoices; booking confirmations will not suffice

issues.description: Personal information not required for reimbursement purposes should be removed before submission
issues.recommendation: Remove any personal information not required for reimbursement purposes before submission
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Any personal information not required for reimbursement purposes should be removed before submission

issues.description: Client line manager must review and approve expenses before payroll cutoff date
issues.recommendation: Ensure client line manager reviews and approves expenses before payroll cutoff date
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Client line manager must review and approve expenses before payroll cutoff date

issues.description: Expenses must be submitted within 6 months after the date that the expense was incurred
issues.recommendation: Submit expenses within 6 months after the date that the expense was incurred
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Expenses must be submitted within 6 months after the date that the expense was incurred

issues.description: Keep hard copies of receipts for a minimum of 4 years to ensure compliance with local tax regulations
issues.recommendation: Keep hard copies of receipts for a minimum of 4 years
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Keep hard copies of receipts for a minimum of 4 years to ensure compliance with local tax regulations

issues.description: Convert amount in local currency and include currency & exchange rate used for foreign currency expenses
issues.recommendation: Convert amount in local currency and include currency & exchange rate used for foreign currency expenses
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Convert amount in local currency and include currency & exchange rate used for foreign currency expenses

validation_result.compliance_summary: The receipt is not compliant with the required standards. Multiple mandatory fields are missing, and additional documentation is required. It is recommended to address these issues with the supplier or provider and ensure all necessary documentation is submitted.
